#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
echo "==> Fetching session refs"
git fetch "$JAMSESH_FETCH_REMOTE"
echo "==> Creating target branch ship/comments at fedcba987654"
git checkout -b "ship/comments" fedcba9876543210fedcba9876543210fedcba98
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 1 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000001"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000001
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 2 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000002"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000002
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 3 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000003"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000003
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 4 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000004"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000004
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 5 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000005"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000005
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 6 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000006"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000006
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 7 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000007"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000007
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 8 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000008"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000008
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 9 of 10: 0000000000000000000000000000000000000009"
git cherry-pick 0000000000000000000000000000000000000009
echo "==> Cherry-picking commit 10 of 10: 000000000000000000000000000000000000000a"
git cherry-pick 000000000000000000000000000000000000000a
echo "==> Done. Push when ready: git push origin ship/comments"
